title: Skill Plugin System
subtitle: Skill/Plugin System
description: Defines Agent skills through Markdown files (SKILL.md), supporting two-tier skill sources (workspace and builtin), requirement validation, and priority override to enable declarative capability extension for Agents.
sub_problems: Skill content injection into system prompts
best_practices: Skills described as Markdown files to lower creation barriers
Workspace skills take priority over builtin, enabling user customization and override
